transcript: So glad to be with you guys. Thanks so much for, uh, being here. [sighs] We’re gonna have a little fun.
Anybody has a comment or a question or a concern or an inquiry—anything of that nature, please let me know. You guys can hear me, right?
[crowd cheers, affirms, man shouts, “Yeah! Love you!”]
Oww-yeah! outstanding.[delay] Absolutely outstanding, yeah.Otherwise, we can just, uh, keep on plowin’ through. If you have a number, that works too. Anything you guys like to do!
Alright, we got one for ya. It’s one of the owners of Third Man—I’m not sure which one.
[redacted]. I’m not sure if it’s Swank or Blackwell, but… Blackwell—
I’m doin’ great, how are you doin’?
”What’s shakin’ about now?” I’m just, uh, cruisin’ down Korean Veterans Boulevard. You know.—
[ Wayne Bent sample ]It is a defining moment and God’s people are going to be vindicated and the world is going to be judged. It’s final—
[ Wayne Bent sample ]—You can take that to the bank. We’re done.
[ Wayne Bent sample ]We’re talking about leaving the earth.
So you—you get where I’m comin’ from now! Hey, uh…—
Yeah! I—I— [laughing] I get where you’re comin’ from!
Hey, buddy, you know where I can peep any pellets ‘bout now?
Yeah, I’m lookin’ to get into some bite-sized action, here, pretty quick! [exhales]
Are you talking—? Are you talkin’, like, “420-friendly” kinda stuff? Or…?—
—to the degree that we’re talkin’ organic and… Ya know, yeah, but, um…—
When I used— When I used to cruise 2nd Street [?]—
—we used to say, “Fatty French bread pizzas”.—
Oh, yeah! So I’m lookin’ to get a crop. [exhales]
[delay] So we’re on the same wavelength.I’m on a perch right now. [exhales] I’m lookin’ to get perched—
Where are you—? Where are you “perched”?
I’m lookin’ to get real perched, if you know what I’m sayin’—get real, uh, pippy!—
Have you, uh—? I— Have you ever eaten a pitched egg?
A pitched egg? Um… Is that like a p—?
Is that like a prolapsed egg or something like that? [exhales]
No, it’s not. Hey, can you hold on? I got a call on the other line.
Oh, it’s like an immature bird, right?[delay] So…
No— Well—well, I mean, it could be a bird egg.

It’s like a roach back—like a hunchback—chicken. Like a… meat-type chicken raised to a size that makes them suitable for roasting. Yeah, I gotcha! I’m with ya! Yeah. [i] Yep![delay] Oh, yeah! Uh-huh! Yeah!
I think a pitched egg is, like, they—they… they’re back in the kitchen and they throw it back and forth… a couple times.
So it’s like rumpless? Where it’s a genetic trait in some chickens where they have no tail—like a rumpless bird!
Yeah. But have you ever had—? Have you ever seen on a—? Have you ever seen on a menu ramp? Like, “Hey, there’s— We’ve got some ramp in this dish”?
[laughs] It’s a shank! It’s like a shank, basically. Or in the case of a—
In the case of a spent hen—when they’re no longer raising eggs—uh… then you get, like, a splayed leg, uh… where the legs of the bird—
—are positioned where the bird cannot stand. Somethin’ like that.
I think— I think— I think “ramp” is a field green like mescaline!
So if we can put that into a nugget formation, then, uh, ya know, we’ll nibble on that a little bit later, I’ll—
I’ll squeak at ya a little later in the hour, alright?
I—I appreciate it, man! Thank you so much!—
Hell of a deal! Hell of a deal, Nashville!
Woo-hoo! You know, we’re talkin’ a little, uh… scrubfowl. And that’s fine. I can talk scrubfowl ’til 4 AM! Not a big deal! Not a problem. Not. A. Problem at all! [i]
So we’re calling a cutlery world just real quick—uh, make a quick inquiry… Uh, up here. Uh…
So, uh… I need to get into a mystical pewter spiral… formation. [exhales]
Okay, and I need a spiral and some kinda gnome [exhales] made outta pewter.
Oh, I don’t think we have—
We have the gnome but it’s not, uh… made of pewter. The pewter, we have only dragons.
We have gnomes but not— Yeah, but not the dragon—just a statue made of, I think it’s resin.
[delay, pitch-shifted] Tell me about the m—Tell me about the gnome. I wanna know about the gnome up ‘ere. [exhales]
[delay, pitch-shifted]Tell me about the gnome. I wa—
Of “raisins”? What’re you talkin’ about now, gal?!—
Do you have any kind of, ah, Pewter Overlord of some kind? [delay]
No, we have the… the pewter, but only dragons.
Oh, a dragon! Wow! I wanna get into a miniature liquefied gnome. [exhales] [delay, pitch-shifted]If I can get that from ya tonight—in the midnight hour? [sniffs]
Throw some Chinese stars at it?
Okay, um, can you… give me your phone number? I’ll send you the picture of what we have. ‘Kay? [unclear]—
Yeah, it’s, uh, [redacted]. You bet. Have a good night, thank you. [delay, 8-second]
So I’m putting that on my, uh, to-do list. Nashville, Nashville, Nashville! Thank you! Thank you! Thank you! [delay, 8-second, pitch-shifted]

So you know where to go if you want a pewter gnome—just head to the 909! [laughs]Aw, yeah! I’d like to talk to you guys. I’ve you have anything on your minds, I’m listening! By God, because by God! I’ll give ya a moment to get a pen or whatever ya need! [exhales]
I got another number for ya.
Okay, and who is this individual?
Kevin, okay, cool. Thank you! [exhales] It’s ringing.Kevin! Hey, Kevin! Hey, Kevin, what’s shakin’?
Hey, what’s goin’ on? This is Trent. What’s shakin?
Who is this? Who is this, now?
Trent! I’m your new neighbor over here. I just moved to the area—
”I just moved into the area,” I said, guy! Can ya hear me or what?
Same area as you. I got your number from, uh, Joe Isuzu over there; ‘member him?

Uh, guy, he works at Reuters. Guy knows everything! So he gave me your number and, uh… Listen, um… I… noticed you were outside a good bit, here lately, and uh… I’m a whipmaster. I wanna go outside and practice usin’ my whip in the morning. I just wanna make sure you’re gonna be indoors and out of the way—just for safety! Ya know?
Yeah, I got a 28-foot horse whip! I get that thing spinnin’ around it’s like a propeller flyin’ through the air up ‘ere! [exhales] [delay, pitch-shifted]

So is that gonna jibe with ya? I mean, I don’t need the liability, I don’t need the responsibility of you, you know, pokin’ around outside. If that’s acceptable to you. I mean, where do you suggest I go?
You’re suggesting I stay inside so that you can practice with your whip…
I mean, does that jibe with ya, or…?
Well you might be surprised to know that whips are of great interest to me.
Is that a matter of fact?
It’s a fact and you can count on it!
Hey, buddy, I got a 32-foot bull whip. I start swingin’ this thing around, you’re not gonna wanna be anywhere near what I’m doin’, ya understand what I’m sayin?
Is this a— a threat to my body and my— my family?
Hey, I’m lookin’ out for you, tough guy. I’m asking you to stay indoors… fair ’n square!
Oh, my god! This is the most— This is the most special phone call I’ve ever received!
Well I’m tellin’ you— tellin’ you the time o’ day here, ya know—what ya need to do! [exhales]
Unless you wanna get stubby real quick!
Well I’ll let ya think about it—
—and I’ll give ya a ring about 4 AM. Take care o’ yourself.
[sample of Wayne Bent disciples cheering, shouting, “Liberty!”]
Woo! Good stuff in the midnight hour!
Yeah, I have a long line of numbers for you.
[ Wayne Bent sample ][delay] My dad said that he was God and… Well, it’s a great honor to… be that closely associated with The Messiah and to be somebody that he—
Good afternoon. Kevin’s Jewelers. Liz speaking. How can I help you?
Yeah, talk to this guy, would ya? He’s not— He’s not makin’ a lick o’ sense over at GameStop, alright?
Yeah, do you guys got any pewter up ‘ere? [exhales]
Oh, no? Well, would you take a look—?
Hot Topic in [unclear] This is Elaina. How can I help you?
Yeah, we got Kevin Jewelers on the line.
Kevin Jewelers is on the line? Um, you have Hot Topic—
I’m sorry, I don’t believe anything’s going on outside?
Yeah, I don’t see anything going on outside.
Oh, there’s microorganisms everywhere, young lady; whadda ya think of that? Did ya ever stop to contemplate that, or…?
Actually, I took a Microbiology in Food class, so I know a little bit more about that than you would, uh, anticipate. Uh, was there anything I could help you with Hot Topic-wise, hon’?—

[delay] Oh, is that so?Uh, yeah, I would like to talk about the section of the female avian reproductive tract where the shell is added to the egg; it’s also known as the “shell gland”… in, uh, the scrubfowl. So, uh, if you wanna get into that—
Do you wanna talk about something, like, Hot Topic-wise, though? ‘Cause I— I do have some other things, if you just wanna talk about, like, microorganisms and stuff.
Well y—you’re the one who said you knew t—‘bout this, ‘bout that, ‘bout everything else. So let’s get in a little peafowl, scrubfowl!
Was there anything I can help you out with that was Hot Topic-related, though, hon’?
Uh, the windpipe of the— of the chicken.
’Cause they don’t need much air to breathe—much food to live!
’Cause I went to college and I graduated, young lady. So, uh… [exhales] [delay] Ya know, chew on that!
I was lookin’ for the pewter toad… that you guys got up ‘ere.
We don’t have pewter toad. We only have pewter with dragons.
The gnome is not pewter; it’s, uh, made of the, uh… resin.
”Raisin”! Oh, yeah! How ‘bout a three-dimensional mallard? [exhales]
D’you know what I’m tryin’ to get to up there?[delay] …with that one?
Can you come to the store?
[delay] Yes, I’ll be… I’ll be there and, uh— So we’ll go over it in person, sure! Uh! Thank you!
[delay] Nashville, thank ya so much! Woo!
[sample of Wayne Bent disciples cheering, shouting, “Liberty!”]
[ Wayne Bent sample ][] Uh… MDs are with naked people.
Disney World’s Magic Carpet [unclear]. This is [unclear] speaking. Can I put ya on a brief hold?—
Oh, yeah! Okay, okay, so whadda you guys got goin’ on up there? How late ya’ll open tonight up there?! [exhales]
How late y’all open up ‘ere? [exhales] [lolls tongue]
I’m sorry, I’m not able to understand you.
Okay, so, uh, d’you have animal rides?
”Animal rides”? Actually, this is the Disney Store!
Ohh! Super, superb, and supreme! Whadda you have for sale up there? Can I get any, um, any blubber from you at all? [exhales]
Some what? Like, can I go ‘head put you on a brief hold real quick?
I don’t really have time. I’m at a payphone right now. And I’m running outta quarters.—
Yeah, see… So, um, d’you have any blubber… uh, from a two-legged animal that I could get?
No, um, y—you have the wrong number.
No, this is the Animal Rides store.
No, this is The Disney Store.

”The Disney Store”? No, no, I think you’re in the wrong place… I’m sorry. So maybe just, uh, get your things together and then go over to the… uh, Animal Rides center. See, I’ll give ya fifteen minutes to get over there! Okay?
Um, can I put you on a brief hold real quick?

No, I need you to go ‘head and gather your things and go over to the Animal Rides store and I’ll talk to you when you get there, okay? Talk to you in about 15, 20, ‘cause you’re in the wrong place right now. Okay?
Okay, well have a good time and I’ll talk to ya soon.Well, uh!… So we can try another exchange—
—if you have another exchange we can try. Let’s do a good one. You know what?—
Let’s do a good one. 9-3-7—uh-huh! I like this one so far.
Okay. And this is… ringing. And who is this?
[ Wayne Bent samples ]I swear it!—It is a defining moment—
Okay, let’s see if I can get somethin’—
[delay, reverb]Uh, yeah, this is... uh, Golbriath. How ya doin’ tonight?—
There seems to be a little bit of… feedback.
[delay, reverb]Oh… whadda ya mean by that? No, the—
[delay, reverb]Oh, weird! Yeah, I hear one on you too. It’s real unusual. But this is Golbriath.
[delay, reverb]And I was wondering if you’ve experienced any st— any psychic interference since the last wind that we’ve… experienced! [exhales] [delay, pitch-shifted]
[delay, reverb]Or have you—? Have you stopped to contemplate… the, uh, Cries of Hezekiah?! [exhales] [delay, pitch-shifted]
Now that you say that… I have.
Have you? Have you shouted his Name into the canyon? Look—
[delay, reverb]Look to the sky for… for answers and results?
Maybe that’s what I’m doing wrong.
Well, ya know, zoning laws… regulate that kinda practice out of existence and they—
—restrict the use of land for purposes such as: looking to the sky for answers or raising poultry—something as innocuous as that, so… [inhales]

Poultry has transmissible diseases, so I can see where they’re going there. But, I mean, just putting my face to the sun, I mean, shouldn’t be a problem! Would you talk to my sister? She said she wanted to talk to ya. Couple questions—
Well you would “love to”? Okay, great.
[breaks up] This is [unclear] speaking. How may I assist you?
Hello? What can I do for you today? Hello?
That is okay! Not a problem, not a problem! We’re gonna have to let her go. She’s, uh, on a mechanical bull. She doesn’t have a lotta time tonight.
We’ll just improvise. Hey, that’s fine!

[sample of Wayne Bent disciple]My mom told me told me one time that she thought I was brainwashed. And I thought, Yeah! I am brainwashed! Michael has washed my brain of all my own corrupt thoughts! [laughs]
[pitch-shifted] [laughs]Actually, fuck it. I’m just gonna call Alex Trebek. I’ve had enough o’ this shit. Alex Trebek! What the heck! I tell ya what I sayin’! Do-do-do!

Hey, yeah.[pitch-shifted] Yeah, this is Louis. I just moved in, uh… around the way recently. And I had my mail vacation-forwarded to your address—just for two weeks—while I’m out of town. I hope that’s… okay with you. I can… come pick it up in two weeks time, when I’ve returned.
You “had your mail—”? Where did you move to?
Ah, oh, I just moved right around the corner from you all, there, and the postmaster gave me your number. I just had it sent to your address for two weeks. I’m goin’ to Iowa.—
What address did you have it sent to?—

Oh, I—I have it written down here somewhere. I just have your number in front of me. Is that okay, though? I don’t.. anticipate it bein’ too much mail. Just… ya know… a few parcels and bills and things like that. Uh, for two, three weeks, here. [delay, pitch-shifted]
And what address did you have it sent to?—
[delay] So…Well I’m just catty corner. And I tell ya, if—if any bills or anything urgent comes in—
Wait a minute. “Catty corner”. What address are you at?
[pitch-shifted] So, uh… just—just approximately, uh… ‘round the bend from you. Uh…—
No, no, no, where? What—what city? What, uh, are you located?—

[pitch-shifted] Well I’m in the valley here. I—I’m new to the area. I don’t know it too well, I apologize about that. But if you have any bills or anything come through for me, please just pay them and I’ll fully reimburse you when I return, okay?
Are you out of your mind?
You are just a joke! Goodbye!

It’d be a big favor! [delay, pitch-shifted] Consider it a big help! [delay, pitch-shifted]Nashville, you have been fantastic! Thank you so much for hangin’ in there with me! Woo! I love you guys! Thank you for being here!
[delay, pitch-shifted] Thank you so much! Thank you so much!
